title: Kota Kinabalu, Sabah — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kota Kinabalu, Sabah: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kota Kinabalu is a city in Sabah with a population of 500,000. Sabah’s capital and the gateway to Borneo’s natural wonders, with stunning sunsets and Mount Kinabalu views.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
